INQUIRER.net Apr 5, 06:27 AM

Silver or pink? Cebu’s MUPH 2026 duo dazzles in evening gown prelims

CEBU CITY, Philippines — It was a tale of two standout styles and two Cebuana contenders in the Miss Universe Philippines (MUPH) 2026 who knew exactly how to own the spotlight. Nicole Borromeo of Cebu Province and Apriel Smith of Cebu City delivered contrasting yet compelling performances in the pageant’s preliminary evening gown competition. Borromeo opts for classic silver Borromeo shimmered in a sculpted silver Leo Almodal gown. The design caught the light with every step, highlighting its detailed embellishments. Her presentation was composed and controlled. She kept her movements clean, allowing both the gown and her delivery to stand […]... Keep on reading: Silver or pink? Cebu’s MUPH 2026 duo dazzles in evening gown prelims

Read full story
INQUIRER.net Apr 5, 06:26 AM

Miss Universe Philippines 2026 drops gown prelim videos on Easter Sunday

Filipinos got an Easter Sunday treat from the Miss Universe Philippines candidates with the release of the preliminary evening gown competition video online on April 5. The video was filmed behind closed doors at the City of Dreams Manila in Parañaque City on March 29, where the delegates paraded in both swimsuit and gowns. The individual interview sessions were also conducted on the same day. Beads and crystals showered many of the delegates’ gowns created by Filipino designers, who showcased a variety of silhouettes and styles that brought out the elegance of the ladies. Curiously, though, Kathleen Dale Caseñas, originally […]... Keep on reading: Miss Universe Philippines 2026 drops gown prelim videos on Easter Sunday

INQUIRER.net Apr 5, 06:18 AM

Did Middle East conflict lead to trash bag theft in Korea?

A woman was recently filmed stealing not valuables, but a garbage bag from a disposal area in Seoul, indicating some South Koreans’ panic over the anticipated shortage of petroleum-related materials. Local broadcaster JTBC aired surveillance footage Saturday of an unidentified woman who entered a garbage disposal area in a multiresidential complex in Seoul on Thursday. In the video, she picked up a trash bag full of garbage, untied it, dumped the contents on the floor and left with the bag. The person who sent the video said they decided not to report the incident to the authorities, but vowed to […]... Keep on reading: Did Middle East conflict lead to trash bag theft in Korea?
